sign_success_1: Uzothola izimpawu zakho ngeviki eli-1 kuya kwama-2. Ngenkathi ulinda, zama ukucabanga ngezindawo ezinhle zokubeka izimpawu zakho!
sign_success_3: Ufuna ukubona ukuthi abanye abantu babeka kuphi izimpawu zabo?
signs_share_c1: Yabelana ngesithombe sendawo yesimpawu sakho nathi ku-Nostr bese sikuzapela ama-sats! Ama-sats yizingxenye ze-bitcoin.
